runMode.title: Run size
runMode.description: Use preview for a quick buyer sample. Use full for larger monitoring and archive exports.

queries.title: Actors or groups
queries.description: Company names, ransomware groups, CVE IDs, sectors, brands, or watchlist terms to check. Keep the list short for preview runs; use full mode for broad monitoring.

query.title: Single actor or group
query.description: Optional single query. Used when queries is empty.

watchlistTerms.title: Company or vendor watchlist
watchlistTerms.description: Company names, brands, domains, suppliers, or portfolio companies to prioritize when they appear in recent victim claims.

onlyWatchlistMatches.title: Only return watchlist matches
onlyWatchlistMatches.description: Return only rows that match the company/vendor watchlist. Leave off for broad monitoring.

maxTotalRows.title: Max total rows
maxTotalRows.description: Hard cap for the whole run. Preview defaults to 500 so buyers can inspect the dataset without a large bill.

maxRowsPerQuery.title: Max rows per query
maxRowsPerQuery.description: Maximum rows per query before the total run cap is applied. Preview defaults to 250; full exports can use up to 6000.

includeActivity.title: Include recent activity
includeActivity.description: Return rows for recent public mentions, claims, and reporting when available.

includeTargets.title: Include targeting
includeTargets.description: Add sector and country context rows. Leave off for compact previews.

includeTtps.title: Include TTPs
includeTtps.description: Add technique and CVE pivot rows. Leave off for compact previews.

includeSources.title: Include source coverage
includeSources.description: Add source reference rows. Activity rows still include source links.

includeDatasets.title: Include dataset coverage
includeDatasets.description: Add service coverage rows. Leave disabled when you only need actor intelligence and evidence.

includeCoverageGaps.title: Include coverage gaps
includeCoverageGaps.description: Add rows that explain where more monitoring coverage would help. Disabled by default so normal runs stay focused on usable findings.

includeHeldRows.title: Include held diagnostics
includeHeldRows.description: Add review rows that did not make the main feed. Disabled by default.
